task.title: Route CodeWiki tool executors through application tools
task.summary: Move agent-facing CodeWiki tool contracts into `src/application/tools/**` and keep Pi tool files as transport wrappers.

goal.outcome: Skill guidance can point to source-owned application tool contracts instead of adapter-owned behavior, including the safe path for sprint metadata used by planning.
acceptance: Application-layer modules exist for the agent-facing `codewiki_*` operations used by skills.
Pi adapter tool registration files resolve project/schema/transport concerns and delegate execution to application tool modules.
Regression coverage catches a registered `codewiki_*` tool that lacks an application tool contract or skill-facing catalog entry.
Application tool contracts document or provide the safe mutation path for sprint metadata so agents do not hand-edit roadmap JSON.
non_goals: Do not rename public `codewiki_*` tool names.
Do not change user-visible tool semantics except preserving behavior behind the new boundary.
Do not require compiler skills to hand-edit sprint metadata.

delta.desired: Agent-facing tool contracts live under `src/application/tools/**` with thin Pi wrappers.
delta.current: Only audit has an application tool module; other tool behavior is scattered through adapters and generic application modules.
delta.closure: Tool contract location matches the skill architecture and tests prevent regression.
